---
title: "Research"
---

# Working Papers and Projects

This page lists ongoing work. Public drafts and slides will be added as they become available.

## Work in Progress

### Barriers to mobility in urban labor markets
Status: empirical design in progress.

### Gendered labor adjustment under climate shocks
Status: literature review and model setup.

## Outputs

- Working paper drafts: coming soon
- Slide decks: coming soon
- Replication code: selected projects

## Contact

For current drafts, contact [h.balarama@lse.ac.uk](mailto:h.balarama@lse.ac.uk).
